title.en: gRPC Java's Netty-Based Layered Abstractions and Execution Model
title.zh: gRPC Java 基于 Netty 的分层封装与执行模型研究

summary.en: A systematic study of how gRPC Java wraps Netty HTTP/2 transport with RPC abstractions such as Stub, Channel, Transport, Stream, Call, Interceptor, Listener, and Observer.
summary.zh: 系统分析 gRPC Java 如何在 Netty HTTP/2 transport 之上封装 Stub、Channel、Transport、Stream、Call、Interceptor、Listener 和 Observer 等 RPC 语义抽象。

readingDirection.en: Read this when studying the layering boundary between gRPC Java and Netty, the difference between Interceptor and ChannelHandler, RPC call lifecycles, or asynchronous streaming execution.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在理解 gRPC Java 与 Netty 的分层边界、Interceptor 与 ChannelHandler 的区别、RPC call 生命周期或异步流式执行模型时阅读。
